title: Central Park
content: A beautiful park in the heart of the city, famous for its cherry blossom trees that bloom every spring. The park has a small pond, walking paths, and several benches where visitors can rest and enjoy the scenery.

title: Cherry Blossom
content: Delicate pink flowers that bloom on cherry trees in spring. They symbolize the ephemeral nature of life and are celebrated in many cultures. In the park, they create a magical atmosphere when petals fall like snow.

title: World Setting
content: The story takes place in a modern Japanese-inspired city where nature and technology coexist harmoniously. The city is known for its beautiful parks and gardens, where people come to find peace and connect with nature.
